_meta.description: Deductively derived expected expert responses for OFS ground truth
_meta.derivation: Step 1 quantitative thresholds from Master JSONs applied to wdss.json v2.0 metrics. Step 2 (NLP) = 0 (no NLP data in experiment). Step 3 statistical correction with optimized weights from DATA_WEIGHTS_optimized.json. Normalization via SigmoidNormalizer(mean=0.5, std=0.3).
_meta.note: expected=HIGH means normalized_score >= 0.5; expected=LOW means normalized_score < 0.5

A1_QUALITY.reason: Only P/E passes (w=0.4). After correction (wr=0.605, df=0.829), raw~0.20 normalizes well below 0.5

A2_BALANCED.reason: No metrics pass. Zero quant score

A3_TOXIC.reason: Both metrics pass (w=1.0). After correction, raw~0.50 normalizes to borderline 0.50. Graham's deep value signal fires maximally on this classic value trap

A1_QUALITY.reason: Quality fortress: high ROIC + stable margins. Both metrics pass. wr=0.666, df=0.930

A2_BALANCED.reason: Pivot candidate: mediocre returns + volatile margins. No moat signals

A3_TOXIC.reason: Terrible quality: near-zero ROIC + extreme margin instability. Buffett would never invest

A4_HYPE.reason: Hype stock with no fundamental moat. Worst quality profile

A1_QUALITY.reason: Conservative balance sheet + positive free cash flow. Munger's quality filter passes fully

A2_BALANCED.reason: Slightly over-leveraged with weak FCF from R&D spending

A3_TOXIC.reason: High FCF_Yield (w=0.5) passes but extreme leverage fails. Munger's inversion principle: debt 2.25x is a red flag. After correction (wr=0.680, df=0.939), raw~0.32 normalizes below 0.5

A4_HYPE.reason: Leveraged + negative FCF. Classic speculation target that Munger would avoid

A1_QUALITY.reason: Low R&D + declining margins. Quality fortress but not a growth story for Fisher

A2_BALANCED.reason: Active R&D investment + expanding margins. Fisher's scuttlebutt signals: structural growth underway

A3_TOXIC.reason: Near-zero R&D + collapsing margins. No qualitative growth signals

A4_HYPE.reason: Massive R&D + strong margin expansion. Fisher would see innovation pipeline potential, though price is extreme

A1_QUALITY.reason: Overpriced relative to growth. Not a fast grower or tenbagger candidate for Lynch

A2_BALANCED.reason: Moderate growth priced in. Lynch would pass on this for faster growers

A3_TOXIC.reason: Ultra-low PEG (w=0.7) passes but negative earnings growth fails. After correction (wr=0.675, df=0.899), raw~0.42 normalizes to ~0.44 — borderline LOW. Lynch would be cautious: low PEG is from depressed earnings, not genuine growth

A4_HYPE.reason: Low PEG + explosive earnings growth. Lynch's ideal 'fast grower' profile

A1_QUALITY.reason: No reflexivity signals. Price tracks fundamentals normally

A2_BALANCED.reason: Moderate momentum, no extreme reflexive feedback loop detected

A3_TOXIC.reason: Negative momentum, price-fundamental divergence is actually negative (undervalued). No bubble signal

A4_HYPE.reason: Extreme reflexivity detected: top-percentile momentum + massive price-fundamental divergence. Classic Soros bubble audit signal

A1_QUALITY.reason: Low tail risk. SKEW well below alarm threshold, no put volume anomaly

A2_BALANCED.reason: Elevated but sub-threshold SKEW. No black swan warning

A3_TOXIC.reason: Extreme tail risk: SKEW=165 (well above 140) + OTM put spike at 3.5σ. Taleb's ruin probability fires strongly (wr=0.99, df=1.0)

A4_HYPE.reason: Maximum tail risk: SKEW=178 + OTM spike 4.2σ. Taleb would trigger Master Override / Liquidation Mode

RSK_SHANNON_001._note: Shannon's formula is INVERTED: confidence = MAX(0.1, 1.0 - noise). HIGH score = high confidence (clear signal), LOW score = low confidence (noisy market)

A1_QUALITY.threshold_detail: Price_Trend_R_Squared=0.92 vs <0.3 (FAIL, no noise), Intraday_Volatility_vs_Daily_Return=0.8 vs >2.5 (FAIL, no noise)
A1_QUALITY.reason: Very high R² + low intraday noise. Clear, reliable signal. Shannon confidence maximal

A2_BALANCED.reason: Moderate R² but above noise threshold. No noise metrics triggered. Shannon confidence remains high

A3_TOXIC.threshold_detail: Price_Trend_R_Squared=0.12 vs <0.3 (PASS, noisy), Intraday_Volatility_vs_Daily_Return=3.5 vs >2.5 (PASS, noisy)
A3_TOXIC.reason: Maximum noise: near-random price trend (R²=0.12) + extreme intraday whipsaw. Shannon confidence collapses to ~0.31

A4_HYPE.reason: Paradoxically clear trend (R²=0.99) despite hype. Price has a strong directional signal even if fundamentally detached

RSK_THORP_001._note: Thorp's Step 3 formula chains with Shannon_Confidence_Factor. High noise reduces position sizing

A1_QUALITY.reason: Positive edge + decent win rate. Shannon confidence HIGH → full Kelly fraction justified

A2_BALANCED.reason: Positive edge + marginal win rate. Shannon confidence HIGH → reasonable bet size

A3_TOXIC.reason: Weak edge + sub-50% win rate (w=0.5 FAIL). Shannon confidence also LOW (noise). Kelly fraction collapses: 0.5 × 0.31 × 0.83 × 0.99 ≈ 0.13

A4_HYPE.reason: Strong edge + high win rate. Shannon confidence HIGH. Kelly says bet big — but Taleb may override

M1_BOOM.reason: Healthy yield curve + low credit stress + ample liquidity. No debt cycle stress signals

M2_STAGFLATION.reason: Credit stress + tight money (quant=0.6) but positive yield curve. After correction (wr=0.704, df=0.929), raw~0.39 normalizes to ~0.41 — slightly below threshold. Borderline LOW

M3_CRISIS.reason: All crisis indicators firing: inverted yield curve + extreme credit stress + money supply contraction. Dalio's deleveraging alarm

M4_STEADY.reason: Goldilocks conditions. No macro stress signals

M5_MANIA.reason: Despite mania narrative, macro conditions are structurally sound. Dalio sees no debt cycle alarm

M6_DEFLATION.reason: Deflationary deleveraging: inverted curve + credit stress + money contraction. Full Dalio risk signal

MAC_MARKS_001._metrics: VIX_Index > 35 (w=0.5), OAS_Spread_Zscore > 2.0 (w=0.5). Formula: MAX(0, quant+qual) * wr * df

M1_BOOM.reason: Extreme complacency. VIX=12 is euphoria territory. Marks' pendulum at the top (overconfidence). Quant: 0, but qualitative -0.5 penalty for FOMO/Goldilocks

M2_STAGFLATION.reason: Elevated fear but not capitulation. VIX sub-35, OAS sub-2.0. Marks waits for deeper panic

M3_CRISIS.reason: Capitulation territory: VIX=45 + OAS_Z=3.2. Marks' contrarian aggression signal: 'when the pendulum reaches the bottom, buy aggressively'

M5_MANIA.reason: Low VIX during mania = complacency. Marks would be cautious (contrarian at tops), but quant metrics don't trigger

M6_DEFLATION.reason: OAS passes (w=0.5) but VIX=35 barely misses >35 threshold. After correction (wr=0.664, df=0.908), raw~0.30 normalizes to ~0.34. Below 0.5 threshold

M1_BOOM.reason: No statistical anomaly. Prices near mean, order book balanced

M2_STAGFLATION.reason: Mild deviation from mean but not extreme enough for stat-arb. No anomaly signal

M3_CRISIS.reason: Extreme mean reversion opportunity (Z=-3.5) + order book imbalance. Step 3 synergy with Marks (~0.58) amplifies: raw = 1.0 * 0.540 * 0.971 * (1+0.58) ≈ 0.83. Strong stat-arb signal

M4_STEADY.reason: Normal conditions. No price anomaly to exploit

M5_MANIA.threshold_detail: MeanRev_Z=1.5 (FAIL, positive Z means above mean), OBI=0.55 (FAIL)
M5_MANIA.reason: Price above mean (positive Z) but Simons looks for extreme negative deviation (< -3.0). No stat-arb entry

M6_DEFLATION.reason: Close to thresholds but neither passes. MeanRev -2.8 > -3.0 threshold, OBI 0.78 < 0.8. Simons remains disciplined

EDGE_VAL_001_Munger_to_Graham.expectation: When Munger score is LOW (e.g., A2/A4), Graham score is discounted further in Normal/Bull regimes
EDGE_VAL_001_Munger_to_Graham.key_scenario: A3_TOXIC in Normal_Market: Munger=LOW → Graham's HIGH score gets discounted

EDGE_VAL_002_Graham_to_Buffett.expectation: In crisis, Graham HIGH + Buffett → Buffett gets boosted
EDGE_VAL_002_Graham_to_Buffett.key_scenario: M3_CRISIS + A3_TOXIC: Graham=HIGH → Buffett synergy boost

EDGE_RSK_001_Taleb_to_ALL.expectation: Taleb HIGH → exponential decay on ALL other scores: Target * exp(-Taleb*3)
EDGE_RSK_001_Taleb_to_ALL.key_scenario: A3_TOXIC/A4_HYPE with Taleb HIGH: all scores suppressed dramatically

EDGE_RSK_002_Shannon_to_Thorp.expectation: Shannon LOW confidence → Thorp position sizing reduced
EDGE_RSK_002_Shannon_to_Thorp.key_scenario: A3_TOXIC: Shannon LOW → Thorp bet collapses

EDGE_MAC_001_Dalio_to_Growth_Value.expectation: Dalio HIGH → Growth scores reduced, Value scores increased
EDGE_MAC_001_Dalio_to_Growth_Value.key_scenario: M3_CRISIS/M6_DEFLATION: Dalio HIGH → systematic tilt from Growth to Value

EDGE_MAC_002_Marks_to_Simons.expectation: Marks HIGH → Simons stat-arb opportunity amplified
EDGE_MAC_002_Marks_to_Simons.key_scenario: M3_CRISIS: Marks HIGH → Simons score multiplicatively boosted

EDGE_GRO_001_Fisher_to_Lynch.expectation: Fisher HIGH → Lynch score boosted (quality growth reinforces momentum)
EDGE_GRO_001_Fisher_to_Lynch.key_scenario: A4_HYPE in Normal_Market: Fisher HIGH → Lynch boost

EDGE_GRO_002_Soros_to_Lynch.expectation: Soros HIGH (bubble detected) → Lynch score discounted
EDGE_GRO_002_Soros_to_Lynch.key_scenario: M5_MANIA + A4_HYPE: Soros HIGH → Lynch's fast grower enthusiasm dampened

no_graham.predicted_effect: A3_TOXIC scenarios: Value domain average score drops (deep value signal lost). Other assets: minimal change (Graham was already LOW)
no_graham.key_metric: VAL domain mean score on A3_TOXIC decreases

no_taleb.description: Remove RSK_TALEB_001 node and its Master Override edge
no_taleb.predicted_effect: A3_TOXIC/A4_HYPE scenarios: ensemble score INCREASES (brake removed). Risk sensitivity drops across the board
no_taleb.key_metric: Ensemble score on high-SKEW assets increases

no_risk.description: Remove all RSK_* nodes (Taleb, Shannon, Thorp)
no_risk.predicted_effect: All scenarios: loss of position sizing, noise filtering, and tail risk protection. Score variance increases (no dampening)

no_edges.predicted_effect: Munger→Graham discount removed: A3_TOXIC Graham score rises. Graham→Buffett synergy removed: M3_CRISIS Value synergy lost. Taleb→ALL override removed: high-risk assets get higher ensemble scores
no_edges.key_metric: CDI may decrease (less inter-expert interaction differentiation)

flat_ensemble.description: Replace confidence-weighted ensemble with simple average (_variant_flat_ensemble=True)
flat_ensemble.predicted_effect: Extreme scenarios (A3, A4): ensemble moves toward center (high-conviction experts lose influence). Less extreme final scores
flat_ensemble.key_metric: Ensemble scores on A3/A4 move toward 0.5 (central tendency)
